title: AutoF - Automatic Death Reactions
description: Automatically sends a message when another player dies on a server.
body:
AutoF (Automatic Death Reactions) is a small, client-side Fabric mod that automatically sends a message when another player dies.

### Features
- Sends a customizable chat message when other players die
- %player% placeholder support
- Optional random or fixed delay (0–10 seconds)

### Configuration
- Via ModMenu: Mods → AutoF → Configure
- Or manually: config/deathrespect.json
